title: Treasure Stagecoach Building Set with LED Lights – 307-Piece Vintage Western Model , Openable Safe & Interactive Features, Perfect for Collecting & Gift Giving
features: 【Immersive Lighting｜Realistic Nighttime Escort】 Three LED lights (1 inside the coach, 2 outside), battery box hidden underneath. Recreates a nighttime Western stagecoach escort, perfect for display and collectible purposes.

【Vintage Western Appearance｜Detailed Collectible Value】 Blue and gold main colors with wood, silver-gray, and light green accents. Rear window marked “VALUABLE CARGO,” including seats, printed carpet, and openable safe. Includes two tan horses and 13 printed details, offering a refined collectible experience for adults.

【Interactive Features｜Role-Playing Fun】 Safe opens via knob, storing diamonds and gold bars; doors open, roof removable; rear storage holds letters and maps; top compartments store company seal and driver supplies, providing an immersive escort experience.

【Series Integration｜Expand Western Stories】 Can be combined with Western Bank and Mining Camp sets for gold transport, ore delivery, and salary distribution. Includes coachman/guard minifigure matching series style, creating a complete Western adventure story.

【Compact Display + Warranty｜Flexible & Secure Collecting】 307-piece compact design for standalone desktop display or integration into Western dioramas. Combines building, displaying, collecting, and gifting. Comes with 2-year warranty for peace of mind.
